underlying_goal: Sprint planning, team management, documentation updates, and writing/editing support for a product engineering manager running an interpretation product team
friction_detail: Claude offered to create sub-tickets for milestones but user said 'no lets leave them for now'.
brief_summary: Engineering manager used Claude as a thought partner for sprint planning, Linear ticket management, architectural decision documentation, message proofreading, and promotion writeup editing — all handled effectively across a long working session.
